title: [Chilli's] Punchy! Cobblemon
description: A Resource pack for punchy! compat and more!
body:
Chilli's Punchy! Cobblemon

A fair warning: I started making resource packs only a few weeks ago and I´m working on this alone, so keep your expectations grounded. Still, I think you'll enjoy what this adds to your game. Also I tried to keep the vanilla (cobblemon) style as good as possible — maybe my perfectionism got the better of me and a few items are overly detailed..

This pack brings 3D models and custom animations to various Cobblemon items.

Note: While this pack focuses on "3D items," the custom models do not show up in GUIs, Item Frames, or Shelves — to avoid putting too much strain on the CPU when opening a chest full of 3D items..

What's New in Beta 1.2.0

This update is a big one — more items than ever, finer control, and a cleaner foundation under the hood.

  • 🍓 All 70 Berries: Every single Cobblemon berry now has its own 3D model. Converted from Cobblemon's Bedrock Edition assets, so they fit right in with the existing style.
  • 🎣 Fishing Rods: Every fishing rod has been redefined in 3D, complete with separate cast-state models for when your line is in the water.
  • 🍎 Apricorn 3-Way Toggle: No more all-or-nothing. You can now choose between three different styles for your Apricorns: Chilli 3D, Default 2D, or Cobblemon 3D.
  • 🧹 Continued Cleanup: Internals keep getting better. Expect smoother performance, easier maintenance, and a more stable experience overall.

Customization

With Respackopts installed, you get fine-grained control over the entire pack:

  • Visuals: Punchy! Animations On / Off · Emissives On / Off
  • Item Categories: Apricorns (3-way) · Medicine · Vitamins · Revival · Battle Items · Campfire Pots · Miscellaneous · Fishing Rods · Berries

Each category can be toggled independently — mix and match to build your perfect setup.

Items

    Apricorns (3 styles to choose from — Chilli 3D, Default 2D, or Cobblemon 3D) Medicine (Potions, Revives, Vitamins, X-Items, and more) Berries (All 70 Cobblemon berries in 3D) Fishing Rods (All rods, with cast-state models) Pokédex (Featuring custom display animations!)

Punchy! Compatibility (Highly Recommended)

For the best experience, use the Punchy! mod. All items are fully compatible with its mechanics.

  • Fixes the infamous Pokédex right-click spam bug.
  • Adds custom first-person animations for the Pokéball and Pokédex.

Customization

To tweak this pack to your exact liking, Respackopts is highly recommended. It unlocks the following toggles:

  • Item Categories: Apricorns (3-way) · Medicine · Vitamins · Revival · Battle Items · Campfire Pots · Miscellaneous · Fishing Rods · Berries
  • Emissives: On / Off
  • Punchy! Animations: On / Off

Dependencies

Click the icons below to download the necessary mods. Don't skip the required ones unless you enjoy error screens.

Note: Every screenshot was taken with all required and optional mods installed!
Modefite
Status: Required
The absolute foundation of this pack. Nothing works without it.
Entity Texture Features (ETF)
Status: Recommended
Highly suggested for advanced texture support.
Respackopts
Status: Recommended
Gives you the power to toggle 3D items, animations, and emissives directly in-game.
Polytone
Status: Recommended
Essential for the custom color palettes and tweaks.
Punchy!
Status: Recommended
Fill your gameplay with beautiful animations.
Features & Planned Updates
  • More custom animations
  • Further code & performance optimizations
  • Adjustable emissive brightness
  • More custom items (Fossils, Aprijuice?)
  • General improvements & polish

Feedback & Requests

Discord Community (Highly Recommended)

Credits Thanks to: - [HamzTheModMaker](https://modrinth.com/user/HamzTheModMaker) for helping me with animation from his [Hyper Punchy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hyper-punchy) - [p1kl](https://modrinth.com/user/p1kl) for helping with Items, RespackOpts and leting me edit his Rod from his [p1kl´s 3D Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/p1kls-3d-items) **Asset Attribution:** All items in this pack are either taken from or inspired by official [Cobblemon](https://cobblemon.com/) assets. All rights to the original models and textures remain with the Cobblemon team — only my own additions and modifications are my work.
